title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at NAREDCO
jsonLd.description:
NAREDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About NAREDCO:
NAREDCO is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NAREDCO!
